steps.title: Use the paradox signal
steps.content: The word "although" sets up a contrast: water is critical to most life-enabling reactions, but on early Earth its presence likely had the opposite effect on forming proteins and other biomolecules. The blank needs a word for obstructing or hindering.

steps.title: Choose the obstructing verb
steps.content: A means took advantage of, which does not fit water and protein formation. B means copied, and D means showed or mirrored; neither gives the needed negative effect. The remaining verb means hindered, matching the paradox. The answer is C.
